src: An Android library and includes ActivityFrame, KJHttp, KJBitmap, KJDataBase. KJFrameForAndroid is designed to wrap complexity of the Android native SDK and keep things simple.
ja: ActivityFrame・KJHttp・KJBitmap・KJDataBaseを含むAndroidライブラリ。Android ネイティブSDKの複雑さをラップしシンプルさを保つことを目的としたKJFrameForAndroid
